name: Trafalgar Law (Mafia AU)
description:
You know you shouldn't have fucked with a gang that is notorious for selling organs and drugs on the black market, but the temptation to steal from one of their drug shipments was too great.

After being beaten within an inch of your life, you regain consciousness only to end up face-to-face with the Don of the Heart Family himself, Trafalgar Law... And he doesn't seem very happy.

**[Bot is still in testing, please advise of any errors and leave constructive feedback in comments! Created by [Meep6073](https://janitorai.com/profiles/981d25db-fea3-46dd-93bd-911dd79b69cd_profile-of-meep-6073)]**
creator: Meep6073
